product_overview: Career Studio AI is a local-first career management app for importing resumes, editing structured profile data, and generating AI-assisted job application materials. It also supports ATS analysis, job matching, and exporting profiles into multiple professional formats.
core_goals: Import an existing resume or profile into a structured local workspace
Create and update a complete professional profile across contact, summary, skills, experience, projects, education, and certifications
Use AI tools to analyze resume quality, generate cover letters, and build career roadmaps
Search for job matches based on the saved profile and skills
Export the profile into downloadable formats for applications and portfolios
Review recent activity through a read-only logs view

features.name: Login & Account Access
features.description: Users can sign in, create an account, recover access with a reset flow, or continue as a guest.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to sign in -> Enter username and password -> Submit the form -> See the authenticated workspace
Navigate to / -> Switch to create account -> Enter username, optional email, and password -> Submit the form -> See a success message
Navigate to / -> Switch to forgot password -> Enter username -> Request a reset link -> See a success message
Navigate to /?token=<jwt> -> Open the reset password tab automatically -> Enter a new password -> Submit the form -> See a success message
Navigate to / -> Choose to continue as guest -> See the upload or workspace area without signing in
Navigate to / -> Submit invalid credentials or a duplicate username -> See an inline validation error

features.name: Resume Import and Profile Loading
features.description: Users can upload a supported resume file or open an existing saved profile to begin working in the editor.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Upload a supported resume file by browsing or drag-and-drop -> See a loading indicator while the file is parsed -> See the editor open with the imported profile
Navigate to / -> Open the saved profiles list -> Review available profiles -> Open a saved profile -> See that profile loaded in the editor
Navigate to / -> Open the saved profiles list -> Remove a saved profile -> Confirm the deletion -> See the profile disappear from the list
Navigate to / -> Open the saved profiles list -> Close the list -> Return to the upload view
Navigate to / -> Upload an unsupported or malformed file -> See an error banner

features.name: Profile Editor — Contact and Summary
features.description: Users can update personal contact details, add or remove links, and edit their professional summary.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the contact section -> Edit name, email, phone, and location -> Save the contact details -> See a success notification
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the contact section -> Add a new link with label and URL -> Save the link -> See the new link in the list
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the contact section -> Remove an existing link -> See the link disappear
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the summary section -> Edit the summary text -> Save the summary -> See a success notification and updated character count

features.name: Profile Editor — Skills Management
features.description: Users can add and remove professional skills with supporting category and years of experience.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the skills section -> Enter a skill name, category, and years of experience -> Add the skill -> See the skill appear in the list
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the skills section -> Remove a skill -> See the skill disappear from the list

features.name: Profile Editor — Experience Management
features.description: Users can add and remove work experience entries, including job details and bullet points.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the experience section -> Enter company, role, dates, and location -> Add the experience -> See the experience entry appear in the list with its bullet points
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the experience section -> Remove an experience entry -> See the entry disappear from the list

features.name: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications
features.description: Users can maintain portfolio projects, education history, and certifications as structured profile sections.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the projects section -> Enter project name, description, link, and tech stack -> Add the project -> See the project appear in the list
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the projects section -> Remove a project -> See the project disappear from the list
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the education section -> Enter institution, degree, field, and dates -> Add the education entry -> See the entry appear in the list
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the education section -> Remove an education entry -> See the entry disappear from the list
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the certifications section -> Enter certification name, issuer, and date -> Add the certification -> See the certification appear in the list
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the certifications section -> Remove a certification -> See the certification disappear from the list

features.name: Profile Analysis
features.description: Users can run an AI-based resume analysis to view an overall score, strengths, weaknesses, ATS keywords, and improvement suggestions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the analysis section -> Start the resume analysis -> See a loading indicator while analysis runs -> See the score, strengths, weaknesses, ATS keywords, and suggestions
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the analysis section -> Start the resume analysis without an AI provider configured -> See an error message

features.name: Cover Letter Generation
features.description: Users can generate tailored cover letters for specific job applications and manage previously generated letters.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the cover letter section -> Enter a job title and company name, optionally add notes -> Generate the cover letter -> See the generated cover letter text
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the cover letter section -> Review previously generated cover letters -> Open a past cover letter -> See its contents
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the cover letter section -> Review previously generated cover letters -> Delete a past cover letter -> See it removed from the list

features.name: Career Roadmap Generation
features.description: Users can generate AI-driven career plans, growth plans, or portfolio strategies with milestone timelines.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the roadmap section -> Select a plan type -> Enter a target role and years horizon -> Generate the plan -> See a visual timeline with milestones, skills, projects, and resources
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the roadmap section -> Review saved roadmaps -> Open a saved roadmap -> See the plan details
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the roadmap section -> Review saved roadmaps -> Delete a saved roadmap -> See it removed from the list

features.name: Job Search and Matching
features.description: Users can search for job matches based on their profile skills and optional filters, then open external application pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the jobs section -> Search for jobs using the profile skills -> See a ranked list of matches with scores and source badges
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the jobs section -> Enter a job title, location, and portal filter -> Search again -> See filtered job results
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the jobs section -> Choose a job match -> Open the application link in a new tab

features.name: Settings Configuration
features.description: Users can choose an AI provider, enter API keys, enable local AI settings, and save job board API credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the settings section -> Select an AI provider -> Enter the corresponding API key -> Save the settings -> See a success notification
Navigate to / -> Open the settings section -> Enable local AI -> Enter an Ollama base URL and model name -> Save the settings -> See a success notification
Navigate to / -> Open the settings section -> Enter job board API credentials -> Save the settings -> See a success notification

features.name: Export Profile
features.description: Users can download the current profile in multiple document and portfolio formats.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the export panel -> Choose JSON export -> Download the file
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the export panel -> Choose CSV export -> Download the file
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the export panel -> Choose XML export -> Download the file
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the export panel -> Choose DOCX export -> Download the file
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the export panel -> Choose PDF export -> Download the file
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the export panel -> Choose LaTeX export -> Download the file
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the export panel -> Choose HTML export -> Download the file
Navigate to / -> Load a profile in the editor -> Open the export panel -> Choose portfolio export -> Download the file

features.name: Activity Logs
features.description: Users can view a read-only history of recent imports, exports, AI actions, edits, and deletes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the logs section -> Review the list of recent actions with timestamps and details

features.name: Toast Notifications
features.description: The app shows brief success, warning, or error messages after user actions such as saves, deletes, imports, exports, and AI actions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Complete a save, delete, import, export, or AI action -> See a toast notification appear briefly -> See the toast dismiss automatically

tech_stack.styling: Tailwind CSS v3 + inline CSS custom properties

routes.description: Root route — renders Login, Upload, or Editor screen based on auth state
Password reset deep-link — auto-switches to reset-password tab

features.name: Login & Registration Screen
features.description: Auth UI with Sign In, Create Account, Forgot Password, Reset Password tabs and guest access
user_interactions: Click Sign In tab, enter username and password, click Sign In button
Click Create Account tab, enter username, optional email, password, click Create Account button
Click Forgot Password link, enter username, click Send Reset Link button
Click reset URL from dev_reset_url response to auto-load reset tab
Enter new password in reset tab, click Reset Password button
Click Continue as guest (no account) link
See inline error message on invalid credentials or duplicate username
See green success message after forgot password or reset

features.name: Upload / Home Screen
features.description: Landing page after login. File upload via drag-and-drop or browse. Saved profiles list. Feature grid.
user_interactions: Click drop zone to open file browser, select a supported resume file
Drag and drop a supported file onto the drop zone
See loading spinner while file is parsing
See error banner if upload fails
Click "📂 Open Saved Profile" to load list of saved profiles
Click Open button on a saved profile to enter editor
Click trash/delete button on a saved profile, confirm deletion
Click "← Back" to close profiles list and return to upload view
Click Sign Out to log out and return to Login screen
See username displayed in header when logged in

features.name: Profile Editor — Contact Tab
features.description: Edit contact information — name, email, phone, location, and social/portfolio links
user_interactions: Edit full name, email, phone, location fields
Click Save Contact button to persist changes
Add a new link with label and URL
Delete an existing link
See success or error toast notification after save

features.name: Profile Editor — Summary Tab
features.description: Edit the professional summary/bio text
user_interactions: Edit summary textarea
Click Save Summary button
See character count or success toast

features.name: Profile Editor — Skills Tab
features.description: Add, edit, and delete professional skills with category and years
user_interactions: Fill in skill name, category, years fields
Click Add Skill button to add
See skill appear in list
Click delete/trash button on a skill to remove it

features.name: Profile Editor — Experience Tab
features.description: Add and remove work experience entries with company, role, dates, and bullet points
user_interactions: Fill company, role, start date, end date, location fields
Click Add Experience button
See experience entry appear in list with bullet points
Click delete button to remove an experience entry

features.name: Profile Editor — Projects Tab
features.description: Add and manage portfolio projects with name, description, link, and tech stack
user_interactions: Enter project name, description, link, tech stack
Click Add Project
Delete an existing project

features.name: Profile Editor — Education Tab
features.description: Add and manage education history entries
user_interactions: Enter institution, degree, field, start, end
Click Add Education
Delete an education entry

features.name: Profile Editor — Certifications Tab
features.description: Add and manage professional certifications
user_interactions: Enter certification name, issuer, date
Click Add Certification
Delete a certification

features.name: Profile Editor — Analysis Tab
features.description: AI-powered resume scoring with score 0-100, strengths, weaknesses, ATS keywords, suggestions
user_interactions: Click Analyze Resume button
See loading indicator while AI processes
See score displayed as large number or progress ring
See strengths, weaknesses, suggestions, ATS keywords lists
See error message if AI provider not configured

features.name: Profile Editor — Cover Letter Tab
features.description: Generate AI cover letters for specific job applications
user_interactions: Enter job title and company name
Optionally add extra notes
Click Generate Cover Letter button
See generated cover letter text
See list of previously generated cover letters
Click to view or delete a past cover letter

features.name: Profile Editor — Roadmap Tab
features.description: Generate AI career roadmap, growth plan, or portfolio strategy with visual timeline
user_interactions: Select plan type (Career Roadmap / Growth Plan / Portfolio Strategy)
Enter target role and years horizon
Click Generate button
See visual timeline with milestones, skills, projects, learning resources
See list of saved roadmaps
Click to view or delete a past roadmap

features.name: Profile Editor — Jobs Tab
features.description: Search for job matches from multiple portals with skill-based scoring and filters
user_interactions: Click Search Jobs (auto-uses profile skills)
Enter custom job title to search
Enter location filter
Select portal filter (All / Remotive / RemoteOK / Arbeitnow / LinkedIn / Indeed / Glassdoor)
See list of jobs with match score badge, source badge, company, location
Click Apply button on a job to open in new tab

features.name: Profile Editor — Settings Tab
features.description: Configure AI provider (OpenAI / Anthropic / OpenRouter / Ollama) and API keys
user_interactions: Select AI provider from dropdown
Enter API key for selected provider
Toggle Use Local AI (Ollama) switch
Enter Ollama base URL and model name when local AI enabled
Enter job board API keys (Adzuna, LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor)
Click Save Settings button
See success or error toast

features.name: Export Panel
features.description: Export the profile in 8 formats via download buttons
features.entry_route: / (editor screen, export buttons in header or panel)
user_interactions: Click JSON export button — downloads .json file
Click CSV export button — downloads .csv file
Click XML export button — downloads .xml file
Click DOCX export button — downloads .docx file
Click PDF export button — downloads .pdf file
Click LaTeX export button — downloads .tex file
Click HTML export button — downloads .html file
Click Portfolio export button — downloads portfolio
See error toast if export fails

features.name: Activity Logs Tab
features.description: Read-only feed of recent user actions (imports, exports, AI calls, edits, deletes)
user_interactions: Navigate to Logs tab
See list of recent activity with action type, detail text, and timestamp

features.name: Toast Notification System
features.description: Global toast notifications for success/error/warning across all user actions
user_interactions: Toast appears briefly after any save, delete, import, export, or AI action
Toast auto-dismisses after a few seconds

known_limitations.issue: Export buttons depend on backend endpoint that had a _check_ownership arity bug (now fixed in develop)
known_limitations.impact: Export should now work correctly after the fix merged to develop

known_limitations.issue: AI-powered tabs (Analysis, Cover Letter, Roadmap) show error if no API key is configured in Settings
known_limitations.impact: Users must configure an AI provider in Settings before using AI features

known_limitations.issue: Job search results depend on third-party APIs which may be rate-limited or geo-blocked
known_limitations.impact: Some portals may return empty results in certain environments
